faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Stapleton home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small irregular holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, silken tubes or cases on fabrics, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying around bedrooms or closets. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillars) on clothing or shed larval skins in affected areas.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Stapleton?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Stapleton typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. A single-room treatment may cost $550–$1,200, while whole-home infestations in larger Stapleton residences requiring multiple visits and specialized treatments can reach $3,000–$5,000.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses targeted, low-toxicity treatments specifically designed for indoor fabric pest control. We prioritize eco-friendly products and methods that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning to my Stapleton home?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regularly cleaning and vacuuming closets, storing woolens and natural fiber garments in sealed containers or garment bags, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets as natural deterrents, and ensuring proper ventilation in storage areas. We also recommend periodic inspections and professional preventative treatments, especially in older Stapleton homes with vintage textiles or significant fabric storage.
